title: Triage constrained-random regression failures
description: Reproduce each failure from its recorded seed, then classify it as a design bug, testbench bug, or constraint issue.
body: Use when a nightly random regression returns failures. Do not patch the testbench to silence a failure before understanding it, since that can mask a real design bug. Actions: rerun the failing seed to reproduce deterministically, inspect the waveform and scoreboard mismatch, and classify the root cause. Validation signals include a deterministic reproduction from the seed and a clear classification of design versus testbench cause. Risk boundary: misclassifying a design bug as a testbench issue ships a defect, so escalate ambiguous failures to design review rather than waiving them.
